canonical_definition: A prompting-based automatic evaluation metric that uses an LLM to detect translation quality errors based on the Multidimensional Quality Metrics (MQM) framework.
papers: Few-Shot Natural Language to First-Order Logic Translation via Code Generation
Robust and Unbounded Length Generalization in Autoregressive Transformer-Based Text-to-Speech
